evidence.title: The Memory Boom Has Been a Gift to Micron. For Apple, It's Becoming a Problem. Or Is It?
evidence.summary: The same shortage delivering record profits to memory makers is now squeezing one of the world's most valuable companies -- and its CEO says customers will end up paying for it.
